actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the posts admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the posts admin page

actions.instruction: Click the "Create Post" or "New Post" button
actions.description: Click the button to create a new post

actions.instruction: Wait for the post editor form to load
actions.description: Wait for the post editor form to appear and be visible.

actions.instruction: Fill in the title field with "E2E Test Post"
actions.description: Fill in the title field with 'E2E Test Post'

actions.instruction: Fill in the content area with some test content
actions.description: Fill in the content area with some test content
Click the Publish button to save the post

actions.instruction: Wait for the success toast or redirect to the posts list
actions.description: Wait for the success toast to appear and be visible after saving the post

actions.instruction: Verify the new post "E2E Test Post" appears in the posts list
actions.description: Verify the new post 'E2E Test Post' is visible in the posts list
